title: Live straddle chart with REST history seed and WebSocket delta updates
acceptance_criteria: StraddleChart.tsx uses Lightweight Charts (createChart + LineSeries or AreaSeries)
On mount: calls getStraddleHistory({ underlying, limit: 200 }) to seed historical data points before any WS data arrives — chart is not blank on first paint
WS snapshot messages (from Zustand store straddleHistory or direct useWebSocket) are appended to the chart series in real-time
Signal events from WS are rendered as vertical marker lines on the chart: HIGH = green marker, MEDIUM = orange marker, LOW = grey marker; marker shows confidence tier and atm_strike in label
Chart updates are incremental (series.update()) not full-redraws
Chart auto-resizes when container dimensions change
No memory leak — chart instance destroyed on component unmount
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
